name: krypton
description: Multiplayer word deduction game — P2P via WebRTC

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @krypton/shared exec tsc --build && pnpm --filter @krypton/engine exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @krypton/network exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @krypton/web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @krypton/docs exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules build
